title: Touch Pure Flex Controller
description: Controls the brightness levels of Touch Pure Flex Air and Tree.

inputs.description: Presence is active. Activates the display.
Display and backlight stays off when the device is idle.
When active, the first touch activates the display but does not execute a command.
The room is illuminated by artificial lighting. This input is not used when a Lighting Controller is connected via the API Connector.
Current room brightness. This input is not used when a Lighting Controller is connected via the API Connector.
Individual display brightness. The value will remain active until changes in presence, room brightness or artificial lighting are detected.
Activate display. Display Brightness BrD will be used. Input is overruled by DnD
Activate backlight. If current brightness CBrB is 0, default brightness BrDef will be used. Input is overruled by DnD
Set custom display text. Display Brightness BrD will be used. Input is overruled by DnD

outputs.description: Current Backlight brightness for connected devices. When Backlight Bl is active, BrDef is used as fallback if the value is 0.
Active when room brightness is above the threshold.

Brightness used for the display when the display is active, and for the status LEDs when any LED is active. Brightness equals CBrB. If CBrB is 0, BrDef is used. Ensures the display and LEDs remain visible even when the backlight is inactive.
Intelligent API based connector. API Commands

parameters.description: Brightness for rooms with presence, without daylight or artificial lighting.
Brightness for rooms without presence, without daylight or artificial lighting.
Brightness for rooms with presence and artificial lighting but actual room brightness below the threshold Brt.
Brightness for rooms without presence with artificial lighting but actual room brightness below the threshold Brt.
Brightness for rooms with presence and room brightness above the threshold Brt.
Brightness for rooms without presence and room brightness above the threshold Brt.
Default brightness used as a fallback for the backlight CBrB or display BrD if the calculated brightness CBrB is 0.
If the room brightness exceeds the maximum value, the daylight settings are activated. This parameter is not used when a Lighting Controller is connected via the API Connector.

properties.description: Sets the brightness value to a recommended level based on the color of the Touch Pure Flex.
